# Teeccino Meta Ads Reports

Weekly performance reports showing top Meta ads by spend with creative previews.

## View Reports

**Live Site:** https://jstnadler.github.io/teeccino-reports/

## Features

- Top ads accounting for 80% of ad spend (minimum 5)
- Ad creative thumbnails
- Metrics: Spend, Revenue, Purchases, ROAS
- Percentage of total spend per ad
- Historical archive of past reports

## Generation

Reports are generated automatically every Monday morning and can also be run on-demand:

```bash
python Automations/weekly_meta_report.py
```
